_comment: Replace placeholder GIDs with actual values from your Asana workspace. Find GIDs via: GET /projects/{project_gid}/custom_field_settings

custom_fields._comment_meta: These three are metadata fields you create in Asana for linkage/tracking
custom_fields._comment_selects: Single-select fields from GitHub Project #57. Use enum_mappings below if the Asana field is also single-select. Set to null to skip.
custom_fields._comment_dates: Date fields — mapped to Asana start/due dates on the task itself, not custom fields. Set to null to skip.

enum_mappings._comment: For single-select fields where both GitHub and Asana use enums, map GitHub option name → Asana enum option GID. If the Asana side is a text field, no mapping needed — the value passes through as a string.

sections._comment: Optional: map GitHub milestones to Asana sections
